title: herniaria glabra var. hirsuta
intro: Herniaria glabra var. hirsuta, also known as the hairy smoothew or hairy ruddier cinquefoil, is a variant of the Herniaria glabra species, a type of flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat gastrointestinal issues, reduce fever, and aid in the relief of digestive discomfort. Herniaria glabra var. hirsuta can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and has been used in traditional folk medicine for its therapeutic effects.
